text_original: Dao has of all things the most honoured place.
text_normalized: Dao has of all things the most honoured place.

text_original: No treasures give good men so rich a grace;
text_normalized: No treasures give good men so rich a grace;

text_original: Bad men it guards, and doth their ill efface.
text_normalized: Bad men it guards, and doth their ill efface.

text_original: (its) admirable deeds can raise their performer above others.
text_normalized: (its) admirable deeds can raise their performer above others.

text_original: Even men who are not good are not abandoned by it.
text_normalized: Even men who are not good are not abandoned by it.

text_original: Therefore when the sovereign occupies his place as the Son of Heaven, and he has appointed his three ducal ministers, though (a prince) were to send in a round symbol-of-rank large enough to fill both the hands, and that as the precursor of the team of horses (in the court-yard), such an offering would not be equal to (a lesson of) this Dao, which one might present on his knees.
text_normalized: Therefore when the sovereign occupies his place as the Son of Heaven, and he has appointed his three ducal ministers, though (a prince) were to send in a round symbol-of-rank large enough to fill both the hands, and that as the precursor of the team of horses (in the court-yard), such an offering would not be equal to (a lesson of) this Dao, which one might present on his knees.

text_original: Why was it that the ancients prized this Dao so much?
text_normalized: Why was it that the ancients prized this Dao so much?

text_original: Was it not because it could be got by seeking for it, and the guilty could escape (from the stain of their guilt) by it?
text_normalized: Was it not because it could be got by seeking for it, and the guilty could escape (from the stain of their guilt) by it?

text_original: This is the reason why all under heaven consider it the most valuable thing.
text_normalized: This is the reason why all under heaven consider it the most valuable thing.
